en.global.positioning: World of Mixologists reveals the cocktail world. Bartendly structures it.
en.hero.title: The global pulse of cocktail culture
en.hero.subtitle: World of Mixologists highlights bartenders, bars, guest shifts and cocktail events worldwide.
en.hero.statement: WØM creates visibility. Bartendly makes it actionable.
en.hero.panelText: Follow WØM for culture and visibility. Join Bartendly to publish events, build your profile, discover what is happening and access future hospitality opportunities.
en.hero.fact1Text: Bartenders, bars and events can reach out to WØM.
en.hero.fact2Text: Guest shifts and takeovers should be listed on Bartendly.
en.hero.fact3Text: Corporate clients, brands and agencies can use Bartendly Experiences.
en.hero.fact4Text: Brands, festivals and bar shows can build campaigns with us.
en.paths.title: What do you want to do?
en.paths.intro: WØM is now built around clear actions: get featured, publish events, launch campaigns, hire bartenders, partner with us or join Bartendly.
en.paths.bartender.label: Bartenders
en.paths.bartender.title: Get featured and join Bartendly
en.paths.bartender.text: Want to be visible for guest shifts, jobs, events and future paid Bartendly Experiences requests? Build your presence on Bartendly and contact WØM for editorial opportunities.
en.paths.bars.label: Bars & event organizers
en.paths.bars.title: Submit your events on Bartendly
en.paths.bars.text: Guest shifts, takeovers, masterclasses, launches and cocktail events should be listed on Bartendly. WØM may promote selected events through its editorial channels.
en.paths.brands.label: Brands & agencies
en.paths.brands.title: Launch a campaign with WØM
en.paths.brands.text: Use WØM visibility, Bartendly event structure and Bartendly Experiences execution to connect your brand to the real cocktail scene.
en.paths.clients.label: Corporate clients
en.paths.clients.title: Hire bartenders for your event
en.paths.clients.text: For trade shows, corporate events, brand activations and selected private events, Bartendly Experiences helps coordinate selected bartenders.
en.paths.festivals.label: Festivals & bar shows
en.paths.festivals.title: Partner with WØM + Bartendly
en.paths.festivals.text: Cocktail weeks, bar shows and festivals can use WØM for visibility and Bartendly for structured event discovery.
en.paths.consulting.label: Bar projects
en.paths.consulting.title: Access selected hospitality professionals
en.paths.consulting.text: For bar concepts, launches, guest shift programming, menus and targeted consulting, WØM and Bartendly can connect you with selected professionals.
en.about.title: An editorial voice for the people, places and moments that make cocktail culture worth following.
en.about.intro: World of Mixologists documents, highlights and supports what actually matters in hospitality: bartenders, bars, creators, guest shifts, concepts, cities and experiences that create desire, memory and return value.
en.about.card1Title: A living view of cocktail culture
en.about.card1Text: WØM captures bars, guest shifts, creators, hospitality scenes and city energy as a curated editorial layer — not noise, not a generic database, but a point of view.
en.about.card2Title: Real places. Real people. Real events.
en.about.card2Text: WØM gives visibility to the bars, professionals and moments that create true hospitality value — while Bartendly turns that visibility into structured discovery and opportunity.
en.events.title: Want your guest shift, takeover or cocktail event to be seen?
en.events.text: Add your event to Bartendly. WØM may select and promote relevant guest shifts, takeovers, masterclasses, cocktail weeks, bar launches and brand activations through its editorial channels.
en.events.note: Important: being listed on Bartendly does not guarantee WØM promotion. WØM promotion remains editorial and selective.
en.campaigns.title: Visibility, access and execution for brands, agencies, bars and festivals.
en.campaigns.intro: WØM should not become a random agency menu. The commercial logic is focused: culture, visibility, events, bartenders, bars, brands and Bartendly infrastructure.
en.campaigns.brand.title: Brand campaigns
en.campaigns.brand.text: For spirits brands, mixers, bar tools, hotels and hospitality brands that want to reach the cocktail scene through real people, places and events.
en.campaigns.brand.item1: WØM visibility through editorial and social distribution.
en.campaigns.brand.item2: Bartendly structure through event listings and connected profiles.
en.campaigns.event.title: Event amplification
en.campaigns.event.text: For guest shifts, takeovers, masterclasses, cocktail weeks, bar shows, new menus and bar launches that need better visibility.
en.campaigns.event.item1: Event listed on Bartendly for structured discovery.
en.campaigns.event.item3: Campaign support for stronger launches or festivals.
en.campaigns.festival.title: Festival & bar show partnerships
en.campaigns.festival.text: For cocktail weeks, bar shows and hospitality festivals that need event discovery, community reach and curated visibility.
en.campaigns.festival.item3: Bar, bartender and brand discovery before and during the event.
en.experiences.title: Need bartenders for a trade show, brand activation or corporate event?
en.experiences.intro: Bartendly Experiences is the paid execution layer. It helps corporate clients, agencies and brands hire professional bartenders for real-world events — while bartenders can join Bartendly to be visible for future requests.
en.app.leftTitle: Download Bartendly on the App Store
en.app.leftText: Use Bartendly to discover cocktail events, explore bars, publish guest shifts, build your bartender profile and stay visible for hospitality opportunities.
en.app.rightTitle: WØM gives visibility. Bartendly gives structure.
en.app.rightText: For bartenders and bars, being visible is not enough. Bartendly gives that visibility a place to live: profiles, events, city discovery, history and future opportunities.
en.app.item1: Bartenders: create your profile and be visible for opportunities.
en.app.item2: Bars: publish events and build your presence.
en.consultancy.title: Need help with a bar concept, launch, guest shift or hospitality project?
en.consultancy.intro: WØM and Bartendly can connect bars and brands with selected hospitality professionals for targeted consulting, programming and activation support.
en.consultancy.card1.title: Bar concept & launch support
en.consultancy.card1.text: For new bars, new concepts, relaunches and projects that need sharper hospitality direction or access to the right professionals.
en.consultancy.card2.title: Guest shift programming
en.consultancy.card2.text: Support for collaborations, takeovers and guest shifts that need both curation and operational understanding.
en.consultancy.card3.title: Menu, service and activation support
en.consultancy.card3.text: Targeted help through selected professionals for menu direction, training, activations or specific hospitality needs.
en.selection.title: Independent. Not paid. Not ranked. Not guaranteed.
en.selection.intro: WØM Selection is for bars worth discovering and worth returning to. It is not a paid badge and it is not sold as a commercial package.
en.selection.card1.title: What it stands for
en.selection.card1.text: Atmosphere, feeling, people, experience, memory, social energy and a genuine desire to return.
en.selection.quote: A place you don’t just visit — a place you come back to.
en.selection.card2.title: What it is not
en.selection.item1: Not paid: bars cannot buy WØM Selection.
en.selection.item2: Not ranked: hospitality is not reduced to a rigid ladder.
en.selection.item3: Not guaranteed: visibility and selection remain editorial.
en.selection.card2.text: Commercial work can exist around visibility, campaigns, events or partnerships — but the badge itself remains independent.
en.instagram.title: The live visibility layer of the scene.
en.instagram.intro: Instagram is where hospitality visibility moves fast: guest shifts, city moments, bars, creators and the pulse of cocktail culture. WØM uses it as an editorial distribution engine.
en.instagram.tile1Text: What is happening now, tonight and next.
en.instagram.tile2Text: Places with identity, atmosphere and return value.
en.instagram.tile4Text: The pulse of cocktail culture worldwide.
en.final.eyebrow: See the scene. Build with us.
en.final.title: Follow WØM. Join Bartendly. Work with us.
en.final.text: World of Mixologists reveals the cocktail world. Bartendly makes it actionable. Bartendly Experiences turns it into paid service. Contact us if you want to create visibility, launch a campaign, amplify an event, hire bartenders or build something meaningful in hospitality.
en.footer.copy: All rights reserved. Visibility with meaning. Structure with purpose.
